name: process_blob_event_integration_with_blob_storage_and_eventhub
description: Tests the integration of FSRAgent.process_blob_event with Azure Blob Storage and EventHub, ensuring blobs are downloaded, payloads are written, and notifications are sent.
input: A BlobEvent referencing an actual PDF in a test Azure Blob Storage container, with valid SAS token and EventHub configuration.
output: A dict with 'success': True and confirmation that the payload is written and notification sent.
success_criteria: Blob is downloaded from Azure Blob Storage
Payload is written to the fsr-extracted container
error_scenarios: Blob download fails due to invalid SAS token
Blob write fails due to storage permissions
